summary: Tested backend APIs and full frontend UI for Jahnavi Somu portfolio. All 8 pytest backend tests pass. All sections render, nav links smooth-scroll, resume buttons have valid hrefs, skill groups 0-5 and project cards 0-1 visible, contact form empty-validation toast works, valid submit shows success toast, form clears, and message persists in MongoDB (verified via GET /api/contact). No page errors. Email is intentionally skipped because RESEND_API_KEY is empty (expected per request).
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/contact is publicly accessible and returns ALL submitted contact messages including emails — this leaks PII. Recommend protecting with auth/admin token or removing the public GET endpoint in production.
CORS_ORIGINS defaults to '*' with allow_credentials=True — browsers reject this combination. Set explicit origin list for production.

Contact HTML email body interpolates raw user-supplied fields (name/subject/message) without HTML escaping — minor XSS risk if Resend is later enabled and the inbox renders HTML. Use html.escape() before formatting.
Frontend Contact.jsx uses process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL without guarding for missing env (would post to 'undefined/api/contact'). Acceptable since .env is set, but defensive check recommended.
seed_data_creation: Created several TEST_ prefixed contact messages in db.contact_messages and TEST_ status check entries during pytest + e2e run. Safe test data, no cleanup required for review.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/test_portfolio_api.py covers: GET /api/, POST/GET /api/contact (success + validation 422s + no _id leak), POST/GET /api/status. Public URL used: https://portfolio-showcase-2828.preview.emergentagent.com. Frontend uses framer-motion whileInView animations — scroll sections into view before asserting. Toast library is sonner; assert toast text via locator(text=/.../).
rca of the issue: No issues found. All requested features (8/8) behave correctly end-to-end.
